excerpt: The official programme page for MSc in Earth and Environmental Analytics for Sustainability lists Priority round opening on 2025-09-01 and closing on 2026-01-31. Source: https://www.gs.cuhk.edu.hk/admissions/application-deadline Priority Round: 31 January 2026 Final Round: 30 April 2026 Applications will be processed on a rolling basis until all places have been filled. Therefore, early applications are strongly encouraged.
